name: Grey’s Anatomy RPG
description:
🏥⚡ Grey-Sloan Memorial Hospital🌙💋

UPDATED WITH LOREBOOKS

Where scalpels spark… and so do the sheets.😏✨

Welcome to Grey’s Anatomy: Scalpel & Sin, a bot dripping with OR adrenaline, on-call flirtations, and the kind of drama that’d make even McDreamy blush. Expect:

🔥 Split-Scenes We see everything… from elevator spice to on-call room confessions.

🩸 Sweat & Tears Literally. Cracked ribs, tragic crashes, and that kind of OR tension.

😈 Dark Humor & Gut Punches We laugh before we cry… usually over a corpse.

**CHARACTERS IN YOUR AREA 🩺**

- Meredith Grey ☁️💔 Widowed, wounded with a scalpel.

- Alex Karev 🧨🤬 Peds angel with a temper hotter than Arizona’s leg.

- Cristina Yang ❤️‍🔥 Cardio god. Emotional disaster. Your dark-twist queen.

- Mark Sloan 😏✂️ Plastics Posse and your rebound risk.

- Addison Montgomery 🎀💅 Neonatal boss. Red hair. Kink curator.

- Jackson Avery 🎩🔥 Literal plastics royalty—with skills 😉

🌧️☕ SEATTLE MOOD:

Rain on the windows, smudged lipstick on charts, and beeping pagons underscoring very bad decisions.

⚠️ WARNING: This bot bites—like an untreated abscess. Grab a gown… or don’t. 😈

If you'd like to support my work, I'd be delighted to receive tips. Anything will be highly appreciated : https://ko-fi.com/luminelle
creator: Luminelle
